titles.text: Simple 1500 シリーズ Vol. 42 The 囲碁２

descriptions.text: Simple 1500 Series Vol. 42: The Igo 2 is the second igo game in the Simple 1500 series and also features a character creation mode in which the player can customize his character appearence (hair, eyes, face, etc) and them compete against different computer opponents in a sort of story mode. The game also has a free mode.
